name: gpt-realtime-slides
description: A customizable, manual-first presentation runtime with optional silent OpenAI Realtime voice controls.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/audience/main.js && node --check src/audience/api-client.js && node --check src/audience/presenter-pulse.js && node --check shared/audience-config.js && node --check src/core/controller.js && node --check src/core/renderer.js && node --check src/realtime/client.js && node --check server/audience-core.js && node --check server/audience-pages.js && node --check server/realtime-token-server.mjs && node --check scripts/assert-empty-db.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run cf:check
